bird.name: Príncipe white-eye
bird.summary: The Príncipe white-eye (Zosterops ficedulinus) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. The species was described by Gustav Hartlau…

locations.name: 古斯塔夫·哈特勞布
locations.summary: Karel Johan Gustav Hartlaub (8 November 1814 – 29 November 1900) was a German physician and ornithologist.

locations.name: 圣多美
locations.summary: 圣多美（葡萄牙語：São Tomé）是非洲岛国圣多美和普林西比的首都和最大城市，在圣多美岛上，2005年人口为56,166。国家的名字来源于葡萄牙语。 历史 圣多美是被一位叫Alvaro Caminha的人在1493年发现的。葡萄牙人来到…
